title: Statistical Assistants
description: Compile and compute data according to statistical formulas for use in statistical studies. May perform actuarial computations and compile charts and graphs for use by actuaries. Includes actuarial clerks.

tasks.text: Compute and analyze data, using statistical formulas and computers or calculators.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Check source data to verify completeness and accuracy.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Enter data into computers for use in analyses or reports.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Compile reports, charts, or graphs that describe and interpret findings of analyses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Participate in the publication of data or information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: File data and related information, and maintain and update databases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Organize paperwork, such as survey forms or reports, for distribution or analysis.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Code data prior to computer entry, using lists of codes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compile statistics from source materials, such as production or sales records, quality-control or test records, time sheets, or survey sheets.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Interview people and keep track of their responses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Check survey responses for errors, such as the use of pens instead of pencils, and set aside response forms that cannot be used.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select statistical tests for analyzing data.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Discuss data presentation requirements with clients.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
